description_long: This is a tall, rectangular, two-drawer filing cabinet with a matte black finish. The front face features two horizontally aligned bar handles, each centered on a drawer, providing easy access to the storage compartments. The sides and back are plain, with no visible seams, handles, or decorative elements, emphasizing a utilitarian and modern design. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from metal, likely steel, with a solid and robust build suitable for secure document storage. The drawers are likely to have internal runners and may include a locking mechanism, though no lock is visible in the images. This type of cabinet is commonly found in office environments, archives, or other urban settings where organized storage is required.
description: A tall, matte black two-drawer metal filing cabinet with bar handles and a minimalist, utilitarian design. The front features two drawers, while the sides and back are plain.
description_view_0: A plain, featureless side of the filing cabinet with a smooth, matte black surface.
description_view_1: The front of the filing cabinet, showing two drawers each with a centered bar handle.
description_view_2: Another plain side view, identical to view 0, with no visible features or handles.
description_view_3: The back of the cabinet, also plain and unadorned, matching the side views.
